meta.title: Alexis — Junior Developer
meta.description: Junior developer crafting structured, coherent and durable digital experiences.
meta.ogDescription: Junior developer crafting structured, coherent and durable digital experiences.
meta.keywords: developer, front-end developer, portfolio, react, web interfaces, rouen, paris

about.text:
Student – Developer in search of knowledge. 

A vision: taking on a role where aesthetics and practicality complement each other to serve the user experience. 

Diligent, autonomous and curious, I see continuous improvement as a mission, not an option.
about.toolsText: Progress is a necessity, not a comfort.
about.toolsText2: I improve my projects through discipline: understand, correct, refine.
about.visionText1: I start with a need. An interface only exists if it serves something.
about.visionText2: Structure, colors, typography — every choice must have a purpose.
about.visionText3: Design has value only when it improves the experience.

projects.approachText1: An intention gives birth to the idea. The need sets its direction. Every choice must serve that intention, from the first component to the last pixel.
projects.approachText2: Each project is unique and requires different skills. I start by understanding the problem, then choose the tools that solve it.
projects.approachText3: A project is human before anything else. Architecture and design must express that humanity with rigor.

project1.title: Financial Management App
project1.description:
I developed a personal financial management app to track my income, expenses, savings and monthly budgets. The goal was to create a clear and structured tool to visualize my spending habits and better understand my financial balance.

Built entirely with PHP, SQL, JS and styled with Tailwind, the app includes custom categories, light/dark mode and a complete transaction management system. Each new entry automatically updates totals and remaining balance.

The interface also allows comparing two months to identify variations in spending and savings. This solo project helped me build a truly useful tool while implementing real business logic and a functional interface.
project1.alt: image of the financial management project

project2.title: ShiftUp
project2.description:
ShiftUp is a gamified CSR application designed for companies.

As project manager within a team, I designed the structure, created wireframes and mockups on Figma, developed the landing page, handled front-end integration in React/Tailwind and contributed to the PHP backend and database.

I also worked on the website’s SEO. The app includes a challenge system, a KPI dashboard and tracking of responsible actions.

project3.title: Weather Dashboard
project3.description:
As part of SAE 303, I developed a weather dashboard to analyze climatological data from the Marne region (1950–2022). The project relied on a dedicated database and statistical calculations to reveal climate trends.

Built solo, it combines PHP, SQL, custom CSS, Chart.js and Leaflet to produce interactive visualizations: evolution curves, year comparisons, histograms and mapping.

The interface allows filtering data by period or weather station to observe the impact of climate change through dynamic charts and an interactive map.
project3.alt: image of the weather dashboard project

project4.title: Seconde Chance
project4.description:
Seconde Chance is a short film created as a team during my first year for the Green Awards, where we won in the youth category.

My role was mainly technical: assisting with shots, managing equipment and contributing to ideation.

The film highlights second-hand consumption and recycling in contrast to fast fashion, encouraging more responsible habits.
project4.alt: image of the Seconde Chance project
